d4m_e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_a.text: Day 4 and your team is on fire! High morale is infectious — customers feel it the moment they walk in. A team this motivated can achieve anything.

d4m_e1_b.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_b.text: Boss! We have an idea. The team wants to create a signature item together — something that represents our shop's culture. Can we try it today?

choices.text: Guide the process with some direction
Let them develop it but review before launch
Too risky today — stick to what works

d4m_e1_c_freedom.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_c_freedom.text: We created something incredible! Customers are already asking about it. This feels like it could be our most popular item ever!

d4m_e1_c_guide.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_c_guide.text: Your input made it even better. The combination of our creativity and your experience produced something really special.

d4m_e1_c_review.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_c_review.text: Your feedback refined it perfectly. It launched to amazing response. Customers love that it feels authentic to our shop.

d4m_e1_c_decline.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_c_decline.text: We understand but we are a little deflated. We had real energy behind this idea. Maybe another time.

d4m_e1_result_freedom.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_freedom.text: High morale teams given ownership produce remarkable results. Trust your people when they are motivated — it multiplies their energy.

d4m_e1_result_guide.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_guide.text: Collaborative leadership — guiding without controlling — produces the best of both worlds. Your experience and their creativity are stronger together.

d4m_e1_result_review.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_review.text: Quality control without stifling creativity is excellent leadership. Empowering people while maintaining standards is a difficult balance you managed well.

d4m_e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_decline.text: Caution has its place but dismissing motivated team initiatives dampens the very energy that drives your business forward. High morale is fragile — protect it.

d4m_e2_a.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_a.text: Your motivated team has attracted attention. A larger company wants to acquire your shop outright. The offer is generous but the decision is life changing.

d4m_e2_b.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_b.text: Your team culture and customer loyalty make this acquisition extremely attractive to us. We are offering full market value plus 20%. This is a rare offer.

choices.text: Accept — a great offer is a great offer
Decline — you built this and you keep it
Ask for a management role in the acquisition

d4m_e2_c_accept.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_c_accept.text: Excellent decision. The paperwork will be ready by end of week. You have built something genuinely impressive here.

d4m_e2_c_counter.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_c_counter.text: Bold counter. We can meet you at 30% above market. Your confidence in your own value is well placed.

d4m_e2_c_decline.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_c_decline.text: We respect that. The offer stands open for 30 days. What you have built here is special — protect it well.

d4m_e2_c_manage.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_c_manage.text: A management role is actually appealing to us too. We want your culture preserved. Let us structure this as an acqui-hire.

d4m_e2_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_accept.text: Knowing when to exit is as important as knowing when to persist. A successful exit funds your next venture. This is not failure — it is graduation.

d4m_e2_result_counter.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_counter.text: Negotiating an acquisition price upward shows confidence in your own value. Motivated teams and loyal customers are worth more than any spreadsheet shows.

d4m_e2_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_decline.text: Choosing independence over a lucrative offer takes real conviction. Make sure the decision is strategic not just emotional. Both are valid but know which it is.

d4m_e2_result_manage.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_manage.text: Creative deal structures often produce better outcomes than binary accept or reject decisions. Thinking beyond the standard offer shows business sophistication.

d4m_e3_a.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_a.text: What a day! Your team is buzzing. End of day and the energy is incredible. How do you channel this momentum into tomorrow?

d4m_e3_b.speaker: Staff
d4m_e3_b.text: Boss we are all feeling it today. The team wants to do something special tomorrow to keep this energy going. What do you think we should focus on?

choices.text: Document what is working to replicate it
Let the team choose — it is their energy

d4m_e3_c_event.speaker: Customer
d4m_e3_c_event.text: A customer appreciation event?! This is why we love this place. You always make us feel like family here.

d4m_e3_c_process.speaker: Staff
d4m_e3_c_process.text: Using this energy to fix our processes is brilliant. We identified three inefficiencies today that were costing us time and money every single shift.

d4m_e3_c_document.speaker: Staff
d4m_e3_c_document.text: Writing down what makes today special is so smart. Now we have a blueprint for recreating this energy whenever we need it.

d4m_e3_c_team.speaker: Staff
d4m_e3_c_team.text: You are giving us the decision?! That means everything. We chose to reach out personally to our top 20 customers tomorrow. Watch what happens.

d4m_e3_result_event.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_event.text: Converting internal momentum into customer experiences is powerful marketing. Your team energy became a customer memory — that is priceless.

d4m_e3_result_process.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_process.text: Using peak performance moments to fix systems is genius. High morale teams can tackle operational problems that feel impossible when spirits are low.

d4m_e3_result_document.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_document.text: Systematizing success is how businesses scale. Knowing what creates your best days means you can engineer more of them intentionally.

d4m_e3_result_team.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_team.text: Ultimate trust in your team creates ultimate ownership. When people choose the direction they execute with a level of commitment that cannot be mandated.
